title: WASM target — JavaScript interop and term conversion
purpose: Enable bidirectional data flow between JavaScript and BEAM processes. JavaScript values (objects, arrays, strings, numbers) convert to BEAM terms and vice versa.

requirements.title: JS value to Term conversion
requirements.spec: Convert JavaScript values to BEAM terms.
acceptance: Test: convert complex nested JS object to Term

requirements.title: Term to JS value conversion
requirements.spec: Convert BEAM terms to JavaScript values.
acceptance: Test: convert BEAM term to JS, verify round-trip

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement typed array sharing — copy-based conversion only
SHALL NOT implement JS object wrapping as opaque terms
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
